auth.confirm_logout_second: Are you sure you want to log out?
auth.please_sign_in: Please sign in to continue in Help Hub.
auth.provide: Provide support to those in need.
auth.become_a_part: Become a part of our professional network.
auth.name: Name

landing.hero_description: Professional psychological assistance for military, civilians, and those affected by war. Anonymously, confidentially, free of charge.
landing.ai_companion_desc: Empathic AI helps during panic attacks
landing.anonymous_chat_desc: Chat with counselors or in support group
landing.three_steps_subtitle: No queues, no stigma, no unnecessary formalities
landing.step1_desc: An anonymous profile without unnecessary data. We only collect what's needed to connect you with a specialist.
landing.step2_desc: Filter by specialization, browse profiles and reviews. You choose the one that suits you.
landing.step3_desc: Video call, chat, or AI assistant — choose a convenient format and get support here and now.
landing.for_everyone_subtitle: Regardless of your situation — you don't have to go through this alone
landing.audience_veterans_desc: Specialized support after returning — reintegration, PTSD, restoring family relationships.
landing.audience_idp_desc: Help dealing with forced displacement, adaptation, and chronic uncertainty.
landing.audience_burnout_desc: Chronic anxiety, work overload, relationship issues — we help restore balance.
landing.audience_crisis_desc: Acute anxiety, panic attacks, loss — immediate 24/7 help when it's needed most.
landing.services_subtitle: Modern support tools in one place
landing.for_psychologists_title: Expand your client base with Help Hub
landing.for_psychologists_desc: Join a growing network of verified psychologists. We provide the platform — you focus on helping people.
landing.benefit1: Your own schedule and full session management
landing.benefit2: Secure video platform and encrypted chat
landing.benefit4: Access to clients from all over Ukraine online
landing.footer_tagline: A psychological support platform for everyone who needs help.

chat.select_contact: Select a contact from the list on the left to start a conversation

profile.no_biography: No biography provided yet. This user is a mystery!
profile.does_not_have_any_reviews: This specialist doesn't have any reviews from sessions yet. Check back later!
profile.no_comments: No comments yet. Be the first to reply!
profile.no_posts_second: This user hasn't published anything yet.
profile.no_saved_hint: Posts, articles and resources you save will appear here.
profile.cta_book_title: Ready to talk to a specialist?
profile.cta_book_subtitle: Book a session at a time that works for you — private and easy.
profile.unpublished_title: Your resume isn't in the catalog yet
profile.unpublished_subtitle: Fill in your profile so clients can find you and book sessions. It takes just a few minutes.
profile.saved_posts_hint: Tap 'Save' on any post and it will appear here.
profile.saved_techniques_hint: Grounding and self-help techniques you save will appear here.
profile.saved_specialists_hint: Save psychologist profiles to revisit them later.

dashboard.title: Admin Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Manage users, applications, and platform settings.
dashboard.applications_desc: Review and approve pending requests from psychologists to join the platform.
dashboard.specializations_desc: Manage the list of expertises and topics (e.g., PTSD, Depression) used in the catalog.
dashboard.users_desc: View all registered clients and specialists, assign roles, and handle permissions.
dashboard.analytics_desc: View platform statistics, user growth, and session metrics.

category_application.title: User category application
category_application.subtitle: If you are a military member, war-affected person, or internally displaced — submit an application to receive the corresponding status. Applications are reviewed by the administration.
category_application.comment_placeholder: Describe your situation and the grounds for the chosen status.
category_application.documents_hint: Attach documents (IDs, certificates) confirming your status. Up to 10MB per file.
category_application.already_approved: You already have the "{{category}}" category confirmed. A new application cannot be submitted.
category_application.already_pending: Your application has already been submitted and is awaiting review by the administration.
category_application.not_allowed_role: Administrators and psychologists cannot submit a category application.
category_application.rejected_can_retry: Your previous application was rejected. You can submit a new one with corrected information.
category_application.fill_required: Please fill in all required fields.

categories.military_desc: Active member of the Armed Forces of Ukraine.
categories.veteran_desc: Person affected by hostilities or aggression.

admin.title: Category applications
admin.search_placeholder: Search by name, email or category...
admin.empty_subtitle: User applications will appear here once submitted.
admin.dashboard_card_desc: Review user applications for military, war-affected, or displaced status.
admin.modal_rejection_placeholder: Provide a reason if you reject the application

demo_messages.ai: I understand how difficult this is. Let's try the 5-4-3-2-1 grounding technique...
